headline: 暑期档预热：新片寥寥，老IP霸榜
headlineEn: Summer Preview: Few New Releases, Old IPs Dominate
summary: 今日无新片上映，本周仅1部新片。痴迷、无职转生、福尔摩斯小姐3领跑今日热搜，玩具总动员5与超级少女持续强势。
summaryEn: No new movies today, only 1 this week. Obsession, Mushoku Tensei, Enola Holmes 3 top today's trending, with Toy Story 5 and Supergirl remaining strong.

topTrends.title: 无职转生：到了异世界就拿出真本事
